Creative Passion

We have the creative genes to make your custom cue stand out with extensive knowledge in color and wood combinations.

Ultra Sharp Hit

The hit with a Cohen Cue is truely like no other.  Our cues respond with every hit as if it was Harry Potter’s wand controlling that little, magical, white rock.

Built with Quality

Select materials and meticulous craftsmanship make our cues perform just as good as they look.

We are Cohen Cues. Your first choice in custom cues!

Cohen Cues is a carefully crafted custom cue. Our cues are designed and created based on your imagination.  We work closely with you to helps transform your thoughts into real life.

Get Your Quote Now

Getting a custom cue quote is quick and painless.  Simply give us your information and we will get back to you as soon as possible with a detailed quote on your next Cohen Cue!

We could tell you that we’re the best. (Which we are)

However, we let our customers speak for us. Our work speaks volumes and our customers speak even louder!

Why Choose Us?

What services do you provide?

We can create anything and fix anything from the ground up when it comes to cues.  We can create custom joint protectors, shafts, rings / ring work, install new wraps (leather and irish linen), and many more services.  Feel free to ask us!

How long will it take?

Most repair work is completed within one week.  A good general rule of thumb is to estimate what needs to be done and give adequate time to allow for such.  You’re coming to Cohen Cues for a repair / new cue and you’re choosing us for our quality.  Please understand that quality DOES NOT equate to quickness.  Our work is done at the highest quality possible and sometimes this means longer wait times.

How much will it cost?

Tip Installs begin at $15 – Ferrule Replacements begin at $40 – Shafts begin at $150 – Custom Cues begin at $700
